title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・希望こそ絶望

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wow... I won against Opera O. My heart's
thumping so fast...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Egad... how can this be?! In the face of this sacred
plaque, to think I'd be left in Doto's dust!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However, this will serve as a building block for
our next engagement! For I have obtained a
sword that has no equal!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: W-wow, what a sword.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Doto and Opera O are getting pretty good.
You think they're up there with the Ultimate
Generation?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Nah, they're not that fast. Today's race felt a little sluggish to me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Today was within the margin of error, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Their status has yet to be overturned. Opera O is
still ahead with Doto struggling to keep up.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yet the Ultimate Generation are out there
screwing up the whole meaning of "top." Those
two can hardly compare.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't say it was great, but... I think I ran
pretty well today. Maybe...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um, Opera O! Does this mean... Does this mean I
passed?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And by "passed," I mean... am I shining bright?
Bright enough to be considered your partner?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That goes without saying, Doto! You are like my
right arm, irreplaceable to me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, would you care to run in the Japan Cup
next? We need something to preface our
generational takeover at the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There we will display our unbreakable bond to
the world! Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sure th-thing, Opera O. Oh, I'm so glad...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to your help, Opera O told me I was like
her right arm.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling I should have pushed myself a
little more... But it's okay, because Opera O
approves of me. Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that... I have my answer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And it turns out it was right in front of me all
along.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The ceiling holding her back... is the very reason
she's made it this far—her salvation, so to speak.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's her feelings toward T.M. Opera O—and her
reservations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's only one individual I can look to for
advice. I ask Admire Vega her opinion on the
matter.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's just as I thought... This race has made it clear.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
To speak the truth, Doto's never had confidence.
Not even now.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
This entire time, everything she thinks can be
traced back to Opera O—supporting, following,
and getting her approval.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
She even relies on Opera O to determine if she
shines.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But that lack of confidence and her resulting
stagnation are also affecting Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
At present, T.M. Opera O is one of the faces of
the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: She needs a strong rival to push her limits too. Ideally, she and Doto would inspire each other, but that's not what's happening...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She could be right about that. Meisho Doto isn't
the only one who is stagnating.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But one day, Meisho Doto will see this for herself
and awaken.
choice_data_list: If only we could repeat what happened last fall.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That won't happen. Probably.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Try to remember what actually happened last fall.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Doto didn't spark that awakening. She just let it
happen to her.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
After my accident, when I dropped out of racing...
Doto got pressured into changing.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
She's not going to take the initiative to change
on her own. Because... she's too nice to make an
enemy out of her idol.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: She knows it, and we do too. Far too well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...She's right. Meisho Doto would never make that
decision on her own.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If she's going to truly awaken to her full
potential—if she's to become the person she
wants to be...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Someone else will have to give her the push. Even
if that makes them the villain.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clear to me now that I need to sit down with
Meisho Doto before the Japan Cup... no matter
what.
